# Plan Task

Use [AGENTS.md](../../AGENTS.md), [Subagent System](../../docs/ai/subagents/README.md), [planner.md](../../docs/ai/subagents/planner.md), [Task Brief Template](../../docs/ai/tasks/TEMPLATE.md), and the relevant files in `docs/specs/` and `docs/plans/` when the task already has them.

For the current request:

1. summarize the task and key constraints
2. decide whether the task needs only a task brief or also a spec and plan
3. identify the smallest safe implementation approach
4. define file ownership and write scopes
5. capture acceptance criteria, validation steps, and current state in the task brief
6. return the artifact paths plus a compact handoff for implementer, reviewer, and tester
